narrative:
Gorham / Fayette (precinct in Fulton County) has 1,357 registered voters, with 60.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 19.5 percentage points.
